summary: First-finish smoke test of the AI-native SWE interview practice MVP. Backend endpoints (auth register/login/me/onboarding, challenges list+detail, submissions create/list, me/stats, duplicate register, invalid URL, wrong password) all return expected status codes and shapes. Frontend end-to-end user journey verified: landing -> signup -> onboarding (student/beginner) -> dashboard (4 stat cards) -> challenges (15 cards, Easy filter shows 5) -> challenge detail -> invalid+valid GitHub URL submission (error/success both shown) -> My Submissions (1 row rendered with View repo link) -> Profile (user_type=Student, ai_exp=Beginner) -> Settings logout -> /login -> protected route redirect to /login -> forgot-password success state (Check your inbox). Login with valid credentials returns to /dashboard.
passed: GET /api/challenges returns 200 with 15 seeded challenges
POST /api/auth/register sets cookies and returns user (200)
GET /api/auth/me returns authenticated user (200)
Duplicate signup returns 400 with 'Email already registered'
POST /api/auth/onboarding marks onboarded=true (200)
GET /api/challenges/{slug} returns problem detail (200)
POST /api/submissions with valid GitHub URL creates submission (200)
POST /api/submissions with invalid URL returns 422 pydantic error
GET /api/submissions returns user's submission list (200)
GET /api/me/stats returns attempts/solved/streak/score (200)
POST /api/auth/login wrong password returns 401
Landing page shows Sign in and Get started CTAs
Signup UI -> auto-redirect to /onboarding
Onboarding steps 1 & 2 -> /dashboard
Dashboard stat-solved/streak/score/attempts visible
Challenges page renders 15 cards; Easy filter narrows to 5
Challenge detail loads with submission form
Invalid GitHub URL shows submission-error; valid URL shows submission-success
My Submissions renders sub-{id} row with GitHub View repo link
Profile shows Student and Beginner labels
Settings logout redirects to /login and clears session (protected route redirect verified)
Login form re-authenticates and lands on /dashboard
Forgot password shows 'Check your inbox' success state
action_items: Rate-limit lockout (5 failed logins -> 429) was intentionally NOT executed to avoid blocking other tests as instructed by the reviewer. Consider verifying manually or in a full-testing pass.

Reset password with a real token flow was not exercised (Resend disabled; token would need to be pulled from backend logs). Backend endpoint POST /auth/reset-password exists and UI has /reset-password?token= route with 'Missing reset token' disabled state — recommend verifying end-to-end in full testing pass.
test_credentials: Registered fresh account via /signup as instructed (uitest_1782931058@example.com / Password1). Admin creds from /app/memory/test_credentials.md not required for user flows.
